choose_language_prompt: Choose your preferred language to continue
enter_mobile_to_login: Enter your mobile number to login
enter_6_digit_code: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your number
tell_us_about_yourself: Tell us a bit about yourself
no_hourly_rate: This equipment does not offer hourly rates.
no_daily_rate: This equipment does not offer daily rates.
equipment_not_exist: The equipment you are trying to book does not exist.
toast_fill_details: Please fill out all booking details correctly.
manage_listings: Manage your equipment listings and view bookings.
cannot_be_undone: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your equipment listing and remove it from the marketplace.
add_first_equipment: Click the button below to add your first piece of equipment and start earning.
toast_equipment_removed: Your equipment has been removed from the marketplace.
toast_error_deleting: There was an error deleting your equipment.
fill_equipment_details: Fill in the details of your equipment to make it available for rent.
describe_equipment: Describe the equipment, its condition, etc.
toast_image_size_limit: Please upload an image smaller than 750KB.
no_equipment_matching: No equipment found matching your criteria.
equipment_removed: The equipment you are looking for does not exist or has been removed.
new_booking_requests: These are new booking requests that need your approval.
no_pending_requests: You have no pending booking requests.
history_of_bookings: A history of all bookings for your equipment.
no_historical_bookings: You have no historical bookings for your equipment.
list_of_bookings: A list of all the equipment you have booked.
no_equipment_booked: You have not booked any equipment yet.
select_farmer_to_book: Select a farmer from the list below to start a booking on their behalf.
no_other_users: No other users found. Once other farmers sign up, they will appear here.
view_assigned_jobs: View your assigned driving jobs and update their status.
driving_tasks_appear_here: Your driving tasks will appear here.
update_profile_info: Update your personal information and roles.
toast_booking_cancelled_desc: Your booking request has been successfully cancelled.
toast_share_otp: Please share the generated OTP with the equipment owner to finalize the booking.
share_otp_with_owner: Share this OTP with the owner to finalize the job:
booking_accepted_alert_desc: The equipment owner has accepted your request. Once the work is done, click the button below.
helpline_desc: Our team is here to help you with any questions.
enter_otp_prompt: Enter OTP from farmer to complete the job:
waiting_for_farmer_completion: Waiting for farmer to mark job as complete.
share_your_experience: Share your experience with the equipment and owner...
voice_search_desc: Press the microphone to start speaking, or type your query.
toast_mic_denied_desc: Please allow microphone access in your browser settings to use voice search.
toast_unsupported_browser_desc: Voice search is not supported on your browser.
toast_search_failed_desc: Could not understand your query. Please try again.
set_location_in_profile_pre: Please set your location in your
toast_address_not_found_desc: Could not find address. Please enter manually.
toast_geocoding_api_denied_desc: The request was denied. Please ensure the Geocoding API is enabled in your Google Cloud Console.
toast_location_error_desc: Could not get your location. Please enter it manually.
toast_missing_info_desc: Please fill out all fields and select at least one role.
toast_invalid_farm_size_desc: Please enter a farm size greater than 0.
dashboard_hub_description: Your central hub for all agricultural needs.
dashboard_welcome_message: This is your home page. Use the navigation to explore equipment, manage your bookings, and list your own equipment for rent.
toast_auth_service_not_ready: Authentication service not ready. Please wait a moment and try again.
toast_otp_failed: Failed to send OTP. Please try again.
toast_too_many_requests: Too many requests have been sent from this device. Please wait a while before trying again.
toast_phone_signin_not_enabled: Phone number sign-in is not enabled for this project. Please enable it in the Firebase console.
toast_invalid_phone_number: The phone number you entered is not valid.
toast_recaptcha_failed: reCAPTCHA check failed. Please refresh the page and try again.
toast_missing_fields_desc: Please fill out name, type, village, and at least one price.
toast_cannot_be_undone_equipment: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your equipment listing and remove it from the marketplace.
toast_no_otp_confirmation: No OTP confirmation found. Please try logging in again.
toast_cannot_resend_otp: Cannot resend OTP at this moment.
toast_otp_resent_desc: A new OTP has been sent to your number.
toast_resend_failed_desc: Could not resend OTP. Please try again.
toast_code_expired_desc: The OTP you entered has expired. Please request a new one by clicking 'Resend OTP'.
toast_update_failed_desc: There was an error updating the booking status.
toast_work_done_desc: The booking has been marked as completed.
toast_invalid_otp_desc: The OTP entered is incorrect. Please check with the farmer.
toast_completion_failed_desc: There was an error completing the booking.
page_not_found_desc: Could not find the requested resource.
